title: LibWeb: Account for transforms in `isPointInPath()`
task_prompt: Fix the four failing tests: Tests/LibWeb/Text/input/wpt-import/html/canvas/element/path-objects/2d.path.isPointInPath.transform.1.html through .4.html. The Canvas 2D API isPointInPath() method does not account for the current transform matrix when checking whether a point lies inside a path. After calling ctx.translate(), ctx.rotate(), or ctx.scale(), isPointInPath() still tests the original untransformed coordinates instead of inverting the transform to get canvas space coordinates. Expected outputs are the corresponding .txt files.
